scripts.test:rules: node scripts/assert-test-project.mjs && firebase emulators:exec --project demo-dias-trabalhados-2 --only database "vitest run tests/integration"
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/assert-test-project.mjs && firebase emulators:exec --project demo-dias-trabalhados-2 --only auth,database "playwright test"
scripts.emulators: node scripts/assert-test-project.mjs && firebase emulators:start --project demo-dias-trabalhados-2 --only auth,database
scripts.check: npm run test:free-tier && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run build
scripts.ci: npm run test:free-tier && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:rules && npm run build
